overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game showing a character descending outdoor stairs and walking through neon-lit city streets at night. The scene features dense urban architecture with holographic advertisements, futuristic storefronts, and wet streets reflecting vibrant neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow outdoor stairway between high-rise buildings

events.description: camera pans from looking up at tall building to facing outdoor stairway
begins rapid descent down concrete stairs toward street level

agents.ego_description: descending outdoor stairs between tall buildings, looking down toward the street below

notable_agents.action: person ascending the stairs in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall dark building with multiple windows and large neon signage near the roof
large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade
concrete stairs with metal railings descending between buildings
orange-tinted building wall with small windows

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a view looking up at a towering cyberpunk building with neon signage, then transitions to descending a narrow outdoor stairway between high-rise structures. The camera moves rapidly down the concrete steps as a pedestrian ascends in the opposite direction, with the street visible below.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street intersection with pedestrian crosswalks

events.description: exits narrow stairway into open street intersection with crosswalks
crosses the street alongside other pedestrians while vehicles wait at intersection

agents.ego_description: walking across the intersection and turning right onto the sidewalk, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in bright pink shirt and hat walking past the camera
blue car driving through the intersection ahead

entered.detail: wide asphalt road with yellow zebra crosswalk stripes
modern curved building facade with glowing blue and purple holographic displays
tall metal pole with traffic signals and street lights
multiple buildings covered with bright neon signage and billboards

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the stairway into a wide urban intersection illuminated by neon signs. They cross the asphalt road with yellow crosswalk markings, passing a pedestrian in a pink shirt, then turn right onto the sidewalk. A futuristic curved building with holographic displays becomes visible on the right as vehicles pass through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with automated vending and holographic storefronts

events.description: enters area with prominent curved storefront featuring intense neon lighting
passes newspaper stand and graffiti-covered bench on the left sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the neon-lit sidewalk, passing pedestrians and browsing the futuristic storefront displays

notable_agents.action: person in white jacket browsing items at a newspaper stand
group of pedestrians in futuristic clothing walking toward the camera

entered.detail: futuristic automated store with glowing shelves, neon green trim, and digital interfaces
large vertical screen displaying advertisements hanging above the street
metal rack with multiple newspaper displays and a blue barrel beside it
white concrete bench with graffiti tags on the backrest

segments.scene_description: Walking along the commercial sidewalk, the character passes by a futuristic curved building with intense holographic displays and neon lighting. They walk past various pedestrians, a newspaper stand, and a graffiti-covered bench. The street is lined with automated vending machines and glowing storefronts, with tall neon-lit buildings visible in the distance as the camera approaches the next intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from the heights of a towering skyscraper into the vibrant, neon-drenched bustle of a cyberpunk street level. It begins by looking up at massive neon signage before rapidly descending a narrow concrete stairway tucked between high-rise structures, passing a pedestrian climbing upward. As the camera reaches the bottom, the scene opens into a wide urban intersection where the character crosses yellow-marked asphalt and passes a pedestrian in a pink shirt. The movement then shifts toward the sidewalk, gliding past a futuristic curved building adorned with intense holographic displays and glowing storefronts. Finally, the camera continues along the commercial strip, passing a newspaper stand and a graffiti-covered bench before approaching the next intersection beneath a skyline of distant, neon-lit towers.
